What I do is I sell a very premium 10 to 20K offer to a select group of people. They wanted a 50 to 100K a month business. So let me not just focus on helping them book calls. Let me focus on helping them with content, the sales closing, the appointment setting, the fulfillment, and everything that they needed to scale up to six figures a month so that I could charge more.
